title: multi byte
text: multi byte Enable multibyte character sets. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = multi byte Description Use the multi byte connector option to enable multibyte character sets such as Kanji. Note: When set, DBMS wildcard literals are not supported. Thus, if a DBMS wildcard such as a percent sign (%) is included in the data, it is no longer escaped out and treated as a percent sign. Instead, it is treated as a wildcard. Setting this option has no effect on Uniface wildcards, which are translated into the DBMS wildcards. For more information, see your Sybase documentation .
